events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, was born on July 7, 1940, and rose to fame as the drummer for The Beatles.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! From the Cavern Club to global superstardom, his unique drumming style defined a generation. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian Harold May, born on July 19, 1947, is best known as the lead guitarist of the iconic rock band Queen.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to Queen's guitar maestro, Brian May! His iconic riffs and astronomical talent continue to inspire. What's your go-to Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, born on July 26, 1943, is the charismatic lead singer and a founding member of The Rolling Stones.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Six decades of rock 'n' roll energy, stage presence, and unforgettable hits. What's your favourite Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV, originally Music Television, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched, forever changing how we consume music. The first video? The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony is delicious.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' Turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', on August 29, 1994, which quickly became the fastest-selling debut album in British history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kicked off a new era for British music. From Manchester to the world, what's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, took place from August 15 to 18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, a generation gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment that shaped music and culture. Which legendary performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day 49 years ago. His music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 Years Since Tupac Shakur Was Shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur, born June 16, 1971, was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and tragically died six days later. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: On this day 30 years ago, the music world lost a giant. Remembering Tupac Shakur, a lyrical genius whose impact is still felt today. What's his most powerful lyric for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Passing
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix, born November 27, 1942, a revolutionary guitarist, tragically passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His innovative guitar work redefined rock music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks and that famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to the medley, it's a masterpiece. Which track is on repeat for you?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, born September 7, 1951, is the formidable frontwoman, guitarist, and primary songwriter of The Pretenders.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, her distinctive voice and attitude have powered The Pretenders for decades. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: William John Paul Gallagher, born September 21, 1972, is the distinctive voice and co-founder of Oasis, and later Beady Eye.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation, still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic solo single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971, becoming his best-selling single.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity that resonates as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple Unveiled the First iPod 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple first unveiled the revolutionary iPod on October 23, 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing portable music forever.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and redefined how we listen to music.

events.title: James Bond Day: 64 Years of 007
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! 64 years ago, 'Dr. No' premiered, kicking off the legendary 007 film franchise. What's your favourite Bond theme song or film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Winston Ono Lennon, born October 9, 1940, was a co-founder of The Beatles and a prolific solo artist. He would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon song?
